title: Inventory Move Fabric
description: This mod enables movement with an open inventory, improving comfort during combat and building.
body:
InvMove is a lightweight quality-of-life Minecraft mod that allows players to move while their inventory is open, including the crafting screen and other GUI screens. This makes gameplay smoother, especially during combat, exploration, and building, as players are no longer forced to stand still while managing items.

The mod is simple, performance-friendly, and does not change vanilla mechanics — it only enables movement keys while GUI screens are open. InvMove works in singleplayer and multiplayer, is client-side, and is compatible with most other mods.

**Mod requires** [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
